PowerShell(Get-Command node, npx, claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; Write-Output "---"; Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\claude.cmd"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json")
PowerShell(claude mcp add notebooklm -- npx notebooklm-mcp@latest)

PowerShell($path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json"; $j = Get-Content $path -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $mcp = [PSCustomObject]@{ command = "npx"; args = @\("notebooklm-mcp@latest"\) }; $servers = [PSCustomObject]@{ notebooklm = $mcp }; $j | Add-Member -NotePropertyName mcpServers -NotePropertyValue $servers -Force; $j | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 50 | Out-File -FilePath $path -Encoding utf8; "Saved. mcpServers now:"; \(Get-Content $path -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).mcpServers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10)

PowerShell($nwReg = "HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Autodesk\\Navisworks Manage x64\\15.0"; if \(Test-Path $nwReg\) { Get-ChildItem $nwReg -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Display|Render|Hardware|Accel|Performance" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { "NW 2025 reg path not found, scanning..."; Get-ChildItem "HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Autodesk\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })
